reforms.description: The government announced measures to strengthen the Accredited Employer Work Visa (AEWV) regime, including increasing the minimum wage required for work permits and introducing stricter job testing processes to ensure that the visa attracts higher-skilled migrants.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Attracting higher-skilled migrants enhances the talent pool, which can lead to increased innovation and productivity.
reforms.status_evidence: The measures have been officially announced by the government.
reforms.importance_rationale: While not a major overhaul, the changes to the AEWV regime represent a significant adjustment aimed at improving the quality of skilled migration.
reforms.source_quote: The government announced in early April 2024 more requirements at the employer accreditation and job check stages.

reforms.description: The Grocery Industry Competition Act 2023 was enacted to introduce a new regulatory role for the NZCC in the grocery sector, improving access to the wholesale market for independent retailers and establishing a Grocery Supply Code of Conduct.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Enhancing competition in the grocery sector can lead to better market conditions for startups and independent retailers, fostering innovation.
reforms.status_evidence: The act has been officially enacted and is in force.
reforms.importance_rationale: The enactment of this act represents a structural change in the grocery sector, aimed at improving competition and market access.
reforms.source_quote: The Grocery Industry Competition Act 2023 was enacted in June 2023, introducing a new regulator role for the NZCC in the grocery sector.

reforms.description: New Zealand is progressing legislation to establish a Consumer Data Right (CDR) framework, initially targeting the banking sector and later expanding to telecommunications, insurance, energy, and health. This framework will enable customers to share their data with accredited third parties, enhancing competition in digital markets.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Facilitating data sharing can drive innovation and competition in various sectors, leading to improved services and products.
reforms.status_evidence: The legislation is currently in progress and has been announced by the government.
reforms.importance_rationale: The establishment of a CDR framework is a significant step towards enhancing competition in digital markets, though not a complete overhaul.
reforms.source_quote: The previous Government released a draft bill in June 2023 that would cover the banking sector initially, and subsequently other sectors such as telecommunication, insurance, energy and health.

reforms.description: The proposal for a government-funded education excellence fund aims to spread best practices in teaching and learning across New Zealand's education system, leveraging the expertise of various stakeholders.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Improving educational practices can enhance the quality of human capital, which is essential for innovation and economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The proposal has been announced by the government.
reforms.importance_rationale: While not a major reform, the fund represents a significant initiative to improve educational outcomes and practices.
reforms.source_quote: Consideration should be given to setting up a government-funded education excellence fund, governed by an independent board with a wide and deep range of expert knowledge.

reforms.description: A Centre for Climate Action on Agricultural Emissions has been established to accelerate research, development and commercialisation of new technologies for reducing agricultural emissions, comprising a research accelerator and a commercial accelerator.
reforms.package_name: Climate Action on Agricultural Emissions Package
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Accelerating R&D in agricultural emissions can lead to innovative solutions that benefit both the environment and the economy.
reforms.status_evidence: The Centre has been officially announced by the government.
reforms.importance_rationale: The establishment of the Centre represents a significant initiative to address agricultural emissions through targeted R&D.
reforms.source_quote: A Centre for Climate Action on Agricultural Emissions has been established to accelerate research, development and commercialisation of new technologies for reducing agricultural emissions.
